prompt_text: exactly six kung-fu animal school mark pictograms arranged left-to-right in one single horizontal row across the center of the canvas: bear head, ox head, standing crane, swallow in flight, coiled snake, eagle head. No boxes, no grid, no dividers, no extra animals, no labels. Each pictogram is a compact bold silhouette seal mark with 1-2 pixel dark ink outline and 2 pixel padding, readable at 24px, using only VINIK24 colors. Background must be perfectly flat solid #FF00FF chroma key and must not appear inside the icons. Order must be Bear Ox Crane Swallow Snake Eagle.
